institution.name: Rocky Mountain College of Art and Design

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rocky Mountain College of Art and Design fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (43.4% → 31.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Rocky Mountain College of Art and Design fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (31.6% → 23.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Rocky Mountain College of Art and Design fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (60.0% → 54.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rocky Mountain College of Art and Design fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
